patch.value: pm todos import: positional source arg silently ignored + folder-not-found error omits --folder flag (beads parity)

Repro (sandbox, pm-todos installed): 'pm todos import todos.md' accepts the positional, ignores it, and errors 'Todos source folder not found at .../.pm/todos' without mentioning the --folder flag. Compare pm beads import whose error says 'Use --file <path> or --file - for stdin'. Two fixes: (1) reject or honor the unexpected positional (an agent passing a file path gets no signal it was ignored); (2) include 'Use --folder <path>' in the folder-not-found guidance. Bonus: 'pm todos import --help' prints flags twice (Options section + Extension-provided flags section) — duplicated tokens.
